task_completion.description: Open Wondershare EdrawMax to create the diagram
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Wondershare EdrawMax application window is open and visible on the screen, showing a blank canvas or ER diagram templates.
The canvas contains entity boxes or tables explicitly named 'Artist', 'Album', 'Track', 'Genre', and 'Invoice'.

task_completion.description: Include names, attributes, Primary Keys (PK), and Foreign Keys (FK) in the entities
task_completion.visual_evidence: The entity boxes contain lists of attributes (e.g., TrackId, Name, AlbumId) with clear indicators for Primary Keys (like 'PK' or a key icon) and Foreign Keys (like 'FK').

task_completion.description: Model relationships between the entities using connectors
task_completion.visual_evidence: Lines or relationship connectors are drawn between the entity boxes, linking them together (e.g., connecting Album to Artist, Track to Album, etc.).

task_completion.description: Save the editable diagram as an EDDX file
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog showing the filename 'chinook_er_diagram.eddx' in the ~/Diagrams/ directory, or the application title bar displaying 'chinook_er_diagram.eddx'.

task_completion.description: Export the final diagram as a PNG image
task_completion.visual_evidence: An 'Export' dialog showing the PNG format and the filename 'chinook_er_diagram.png', or the exported PNG file visible in a file manager window in the ~/Diagrams/ directory.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the EdrawMax GUI to build the diagram
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent dragging and dropping shapes, typing in entity names, or using EdrawMax toolbar options, rather than just running a script in the terminal.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply open a pre-existing image file
integrity.visual_evidence: The diagram is seen being actively constructed in the EdrawMax workspace, not just viewed in an image viewer or imported as a single flat image.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to download or copy pre-made solution files
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal windows do not show commands like 'wget', 'curl', or 'cp' being used to place 'chinook_er_diagram.eddx' or 'chinook_er_diagram.png' directly into the target directory.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The required entities to look for in the diagram are: Artist, Album, Track, Genre, and Invoice. The expected output files are /home/ga/Diagrams/chinook_er_diagram.eddx and /home/ga/Diagrams/chinook_er_diagram.png.
